scripts.test:integration: npm run build:integration-test && npm run test:integration -w autify-cli
scripts.test:integration:dev: npm run build:integration-test && npm run test:integration:dev -w autify-cli
scripts.test:integration:record: npm run build:integration-test && npm run test:integration:record -w autify-cli
scripts.test:integration:dev:record: npm run build:integration-test && npm run test:integration:dev:record -w autify-cli
scripts.test:integration:connect: npm run build:integration-test && npm run test:integration:connect -w autify-cli
scripts.test:integration:connect:dev: npm run build:integration-test && npm run test:integration:connect:dev -w autify-cli
scripts.test:integration:connect:record: npm run build:integration-test && npm run test:integration:connect:record -w autify-cli
scripts.test:integration:connect:dev:record: npm run build:integration-test && npm run test:integration:connect:dev:record -w autify-cli
scripts.test:proxy: npm run build:integration-test && cross-env AUTIFY_CLI_PATH=../autify-cli/bin/dev npm run test:proxy -w integration-test
